title: PSSOU B.Ed & D.El.Ed 2026 – Key Highlights

detail.title: PSSOU B.Ed & D.El.Ed 2026 – Key Highlights
detail.short_info: PSSOU Chhattisgarh B.Ed & D.El.Ed Admission 2026 is open. Apply online by June 12, 2026 (midnight). Entrance exam on June 28, 2026. Check eligibility, application fee, important dates, and how to apply on the official website pssou.ac.in.

content.text: PSSOU Chhattisgarh B.Ed, D.El.Ed Admission 2026 is now open for the 2026-27 academic session at Pt. Sundarlal Sharma (Open) University Chhattisgarh (PSSOU). Applications for the Pre B.Ed and Pre D.El.Ed Entrance Exam started on March 25, 2026, and the last date to apply is June 12, 2026 (midnight). The entrance exam is scheduled for June 28, 2026.

Pt. Sundarlal Sharma (Open) University Chhattisgarh (PSSOU) offers two-year distance mode B.Ed and D.El.Ed programmes. Admission is based on the Pre B.Ed / Pre D.El.Ed Entrance Examination followed by counselling. This is an excellent opportunity for working professionals and students seeking teacher training through open and distance learning.

rows: B.Ed (2 years) & D.El.Ed (2 years) – Distance Mode

content.text: • PSSOU Official Website • Apply Online / Admission Portal • Download Official Notification PDF

rows: Graduation / Post Graduation with minimum required marks as per NCTE norms + Entrance Exam
10+2 (Higher Secondary) with minimum required marks as per norms + Entrance Exam

content.text: Note: Exact percentage criteria and subject requirements are given in the official notification PDF.

sections.heading: How to Apply for PSSOU B.Ed / D.El.Ed Admission 2026

items: Visit the official website pssou.ac.in or portal https://pssou.net/
Click on the B.Ed / D.El.Ed Admission 2026 link.
Register and fill the online application form carefully.
Upload required documents and pay the application fee.
Submit the form and take a printout.
Submit the hard copy of the application (if required) to the university office.

sections.heading: PSSOU Pre B.Ed & Pre D.El.Ed Entrance Exam Pattern

content.text: The entrance exam is conducted offline for both B.Ed and D.El.Ed.
Part A (Common – 80 Marks): General Hindi Comprehension, General English Comprehension, Logical & Analytical Reasoning, Educational & General Awareness, Teaching Learning & The School.
Part B (Subject Competence – 20 Marks): Choose any one – Science / Mathematics / Social Science.
